name: opl-flow
description: OPL Flow installs one thin Codex runtime profile, explicit compatibility prompts, risk-aware evidence rules, and narrow Git/release mechanical audits.

interface.longDescription: OPL Flow packages a thin AGENTS.md runtime profile compatible with OPL App Full and Superpowers, plus explicit planner/executor/debugger/verifier compatibility prompts, risk-aware evidence selection, and fail-closed Git lane and GitHub release audits.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use OPL Flow to install or diagnose the thin AGENTS.md runtime profile and its mechanical guardrails.
